zone.title: Zone
zone.description: The isolation boundary that owns applications, resources, providers, policy activation, signing keys, authority state, and audit evidence.

application.title: Application
application.description: Registered software identity that authenticates to Caracal and requests authority.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: Opaque external JWT subject federated for attribution, provider connections, lifecycle, revocation, and Subject Approval decisions.

authority-record.title: Authority Record
authority-record.description: One STS exchange record that anchors authority ancestry, attribution, revocation, and audit.

session.title: Session
session.description: A Coordinator-tracked governed execution with lifecycle, lineage, labels, optional Subject attribution, and revocation state.

resource.title: Resource
resource.description: A stable protected target with declared scopes, routing, and one upstream credential provider binding when Gateway-routed.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: The upstream authentication mode and sealed credential material Gateway applies after Caracal authority is accepted.

policy.title: Policy
policy.description: Versioned policy data evaluated through Caracal's deny-by-default decision contract during STS exchange.

mandate.title: Mandate
mandate.description: A short-lived, signed JWT carrying policy-approved authority and its revocation anchors.

delegation.title: Delegation
delegation.description: A positive-TTL transfer or narrowing of authority between two Sessions, bounded by scopes, resource, expiry, and hop constraints.

constraint.title: Delegation Constraint
constraint.description: A typed resource, scope, TTL, or hop bound applied to Delegation authority.

approval.title: Approval
approval.description: A policy-raised, single-use hold that requires an authorized operator or federated Subject decision before STS issues a Mandate.

revocation.title: Revocation
revocation.description: Monotonic invalidation of Authority records, Sessions, or Delegations propagated to enforcement points; latency depends on the enforcement path and already-issued Mandate TTL.

audit-ledger.title: Audit Ledger
audit-ledger.description: Append-only, request-correlated evidence for authority decisions, protected actions, administration, and incidents.
